main.description: Network latency rollup derived purely from indexed receipts' signed `startedAt`/`completedAt` pairs — the last ≤100 per group (overall, per-provider, per-model). No side metrics store: the receipts are the source of truth, so the numbers cannot drift from them.

schema.description: Latency overview, grouped overall and by provider and model. Each group reports a sample size and summary statistics (e.g. p50/p95) over the receipts' start→complete durations.
